name: Qualified Tips Deduction

eligibility.description: Applies to tips reported on tax forms for tax years 2025-2028; subject to AGI phase-outs starting at $150k ($300k joint) and excludes specified service trades.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows a deduction of up to $25,000 for qualified cash tips received in the course of an occupation that customarily receives tips, effectively making that tip income tax-free.
